title: Hoping Power Bucket Elevator
content:
Project Name: Hoping Power Bucket Elevator.
Project code: 4019015.
Client: THYSSENKRUPP INDUSTRIAL SOLUTIONS AG, Germany.
Project contract Weight: 360 Tons.
Description:  Scope - Material Supply, Fabrication, preassembly, Painting, assembly of free issued mechanical components, Installation & testing of free issued hydraulic components, Installation & testing of free issued E&I components, packing & FAS delivery jebel Ali port.
Location: Taiwan.
Field of activity: Manufacturing Works.
Market sector: Bulk Material Handling.
Status: Completed 2020.
MO 304, Jebel Ali free Zone, Dubai, UAE
